title: Google Ads Enhanced Conversions provider config
description: Configuration shape for a Google Ads Enhanced Conversions Upload integration.

developer_token.description: Google Ads API developer token. Encrypted at rest.

conversion_action_id.description: The conversion action ID configured in Google Ads for this event. One action per event_type.

refresh_token.description: OAuth2 refresh token. Encrypted at rest.

client_secret.description: OAuth2 client secret. Encrypted at rest.

login_customer_id.description: Optional login customer ID for MCC-hierarchy access. When the developer token is bound to an MCC account, this identifies the login user.

conversion_action_map.description: Optional per-event-type override of conversion_action_id. When present, keys are MarketingEventType values and values are per-event conversion action IDs. Falls back to the top-level conversion_action_id when no key matches.
